questions.question: Explain the difference between arrays and structures with examples.
expectedPoints: Arrays store homogeneous elements, structures store heterogeneous data
Array elements accessed by index, structure members by name
Example: int scores[5] vs struct Student {int id; char name[50];}

questions.question: Describe nested structures with a practical example and explain how to access their members.
expectedPoints: Definition: structure containing another structure as member
Practical example: Student containing Address structure
